title: GOOD: Static scratch buffers avoid per-packet heap allocation in TX/RX paths
description: lichen_l2.c lines 57-62: tx_ipv6_buf, tx_frame_buf, rx_ipv6_buf are static arrays protected by mutexes. This avoids k_malloc/k_free on every packet, which is important for embedded systems with limited heap and deterministic timing requirements. The comment (lines 44-56) explains buffer sizing rationale including SCHC assumptions.
